metadata.description: Centralized validated signals database. ONLY signals that pass 2025/2026 out-of-sample validation using universal benchmarking standards (vs_avg < -2 threshold).
metadata.validation_status: Updated to vs_avg < -2 threshold (beat field by 2+ strokes = meaningful outliers)
metadata.benchmarking_standard: See BENCHMARKING_STANDARDS.md for universal metrics framework
metadata.threshold: < -2 for BET signals, > +2 for FADE signals
metadata.source: Orange Deep Analysis (62 signals) + 2025/2026 validation + Tier 3B asymmetrical threshold analysis

signals_bet.description: Orange + Full Moon + Calm = operational clarity peak. STRONGEST signal at meaningful threshold (39% beat by 2+ strokes). Validated on 2025/2026.
Orange + New Moon + Calm = operational clarity. Peak signal (35.5% beat by 2+ strokes). Validated on 2025/2026.
New Moon dominates. Strong single signal across all conditions (35.5% beat by 2+ strokes). Validated on 2025/2026.
Orange in Calm conditions beats field by 2+ strokes 29.4% of rounds. Broadest, most stable signal. Validated on 2025/2026.
Waxing + Calm. Stable signal at meaningful threshold (30% beat by 2+ strokes). Broadest reliable signal (large n). Validated on 2025/2026.

signals_fade.description: Libra horoscope underperforms significantly (lose to field by 2+ strokes 32.1% of rounds). Stable fade signal. Validated on 2025/2026.

removed_signals.reason: 2025/2026 validation showed signals reversed or weakened beyond statistical significance; OR incompatible with new vs_avg < -2 benchmarking standard

list.reason: Effect flipped sign in 2025/2026. Overfitted to earlier data.
Effect flipped sign in 2025/2026. Overfitted to earlier data.
Similar to other Color×Exec combinations which reversed. Removed preemptively.
Small sample (n=40). Color×Exec pattern suggests overfitting.
Not tested in 2025/2026 validation. Requires retest.
Not tested in 2025/2026 validation. Requires retest.
Not tested in 2025/2026 validation. Requires retest.

notes.sign_convention: vs_avg = score - course_avg. Negative = beats field (good). Positive = loses to field (bad).
notes.threshold_2025: vs_avg < -2 (beat field by 2+ strokes = meaningful outlier)
notes.why_meaningful_threshold: Asymmetrical distribution: beating by 2+ is ~29% (not 50% like beating by any amount). Captures real outperformance, not marginal beats.
notes.tier_1: Maximum conviction - use in direct matchup decisions. n >= 76, beat% > 35%
notes.tier_2: Strong conviction - enhance matchups as secondary filters. n >= 70, beat% > 29%
notes.validation_standard: 2025/2026 out-of-sample testing. Must hold p<0.05 AND beat_field_pct > 25%
notes.key_insight: Archetypal signals (Orange × Moon × Condition) are STABLE. Color×Exec combos from prior analysis were OVERFITTED. New threshold (< -2) reveals meaningful outliers, not just marginal beats.
notes.old_vs_new: Old threshold (< 0) showed ~57% beat field. New threshold (< -2) shows ~29% beat by 2+ strokes. Same signal, more conservative interpretation = better.
notes.how_to_add: New signals must pass 2025/2026 validation using vs_avg < -2 threshold. Must report beat_field_pct, n, p_value, and effect size per BENCHMARKING_STANDARDS.md.
